name: Seymil "Smiley"
description:
🐶| Golden Retriever Boyfriend- or, beagle?- MLM

Smiley from Sherlock Hound, added to find in search, sorry.

Anyways, I added a few headcannons, nothing plot changing. But I hate when people add headcannons into a bot than never say what they are. I added: he's dyslexic, his real name is Seymil, but because of his undiagnosed condition he often signed himself as Smiley and more so accepted the nickname. That's it.

If anyone wants a fem or a neutral pov, just let me know!
creator: Zincluminium
